lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold

lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated

lists.151: component or system operation obstructed or blocked

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.1: Nsx_hevc_dact_volt_avl - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / voltage mode allowed(01h)
lists.2: Nsx_hevc_dact_ztq - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / zero-torque regulation all(02h)
lists.3: Nsx_hevc_dact_imd_off - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / immediate shut-off(03h)
lists.15: Nsx_hevc_dact_uv - Deactivation Request Reserved for safety(0fh)

lists.209: Phase error exceeds phase lock range (D1h)
lists.212: Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS mismatch threshold (D4h)
lists.213: Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS overrange threshold (D5h)

lists.1: Nsx_auto_diag_apc_off - Auto diag without apc allowed
lists.2: Nsx_auto_diag_apc_on - Auto diag with apc allowed
lists.5: Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_wait - auto diag basic software waiting
lists.6: Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_tout - auto diag basic software time out

lists.3: Nsx_stc_uex_brak : "Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.4: Nsx_stc_uex_acc_neg : "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"(04h)
lists.5: Nsx_stc_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"(05h)
lists.6: Nsx_dyn_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(06h)
lists.7: Nsx_stc_obrak : "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(07h)
lists.8: Nsx_dyn_obrak : "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(08h)
lists.9: Nsx_stc_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"(09h)
lists.10: Nsx_dyn_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0ah)
lists.11: Nsx_stc_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy"(0bh)
lists.12: Nsx_dyn_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0ch)
lists.13: Nsx_ov_der_dfl : Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage(0dh)
lists.14: Nsx_term_der_dfl : Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)(0eh)

lists.7: Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
lists.8: Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
lists.11: 1 Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode  (0bh)

lists.1: Nsx_gc_md_03 - GC-MD03 : minor failure whithout impact on traction

lists.8: Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)

lists.8: Nsx_hv_rly_open_dfl - false open relay status information

lists.0: tracebility variable (Detail dans le fichier TracabiliteExecutionPourINV600.doc )

lists.1: Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_  both currents are out of range  OR the 2 currents are inconsistent (difference > thershold)(01h)

lists.3: Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_ current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_f_2) is out of range(03h)

lists.0: Nsx_no_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl :  the summ of the 3 currents is close to zero (< threshold)(00h)
lists.1: Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_   the summ of the 3 currents isn't close to zero (>threshold)  OR at least 2 of the currents are out of range(01h)

lists.3: Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_ current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_2) is out of range(03h)
lists.4: Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_4  : current from sensor 3 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_3) is out of range(04h)
